title: dolichos axilliflorus
intro: Dolichos axilliflorus, also known as the Indian cluster bean or Indian flat bean, is a plant species native to tropical Asia and Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Dolichos axilliflorus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the management of diabetes. Dolichos axilliflorus is often prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including decoctions, infusions, and capsules, which are used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
